response: Hello! 👋 Welcome to Dodos Code! I'm your AI assistant. I can help you with info about our services, pricing, portfolio, and how to get started. What would you like to know?

We are **Dodos Code** 🚀 — an AI-native digital studio based in Lahore, Pakistan, serving clients globally (USA, UK, UAE, Europe, Australia). Founded in 2023, we specialize in building AI-powered web apps, mobile apps, and automation systems. 50+ products shipped, zero compromises on quality!

We offer 6 core services 💼:

1. **Web Development** — Django, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL
2. **AI & LLM Integration** — GPT-4o, Claude, Groq, RAG pipelines
3. **Mobile Apps** — Flutter, React Native (iOS & Android)
4. **UI/UX Design** — Figma, design systems, prototypes
5. **Automation & Scraping** — n8n, Playwright, Python
6. **E-Commerce** — EasyPaisa, JazzCash, Stripe, full shops

Which service interests you most?

Our Web Development stack is top-tier 🌐:

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS
**Backend:** Django, FastAPI, Node.js
**Database:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
**Cloud:** AWS, DigitalOcean, Vercel, Railway
**DevOps:** Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD

Pricing starts at **$500** for basic sites, **$2,000+** for full platforms. Want a free quote?

AI & LLM Integration is our specialty 🤖:

**LLMs:** GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini, Llama 3, Groq
**Frameworks:** LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen
**Features:** RAG pipelines, AI chatbots, fine-tuning, vector DBs (Pinecone, ChromaDB)

Pricing: **$800** for simple chatbot | **$3,000+** for full AI agent systems

Want an AI chatbot like me for your business? 😊

We build stunning mobile apps 📱:

**Cross-Platform:** Flutter (one codebase for iOS & Android)
**Native:** Swift (iOS), Kotlin (Android)
**Features:** Firebase, push notifications, in-app purchases, offline mode

**Pricing:**
- MVP app: $1,500 – $4,000
- Full-featured app: $4,000 – $12,000+

Our Quran & Athan app has **50,000+ downloads with 4.8★**! Want similar results?

Our UI/UX Design team creates pixel-perfect experiences 🎨:

**Tools:** Figma, Adobe XD, Framer, Principle
**Deliverables:** Wireframes, hi-fi mockups, clickable prototypes, design systems, brand kits

**Pricing:**
- Landing page design: $300
- Full design system: $800+
- Complete brand kit: $500+

Want to see our portfolio?

We automate everything 🔧:

**Tools:** n8n, Zapier, Make (Integromat), Playwright, Puppeteer, Scrapy
**Use Cases:** Lead generation, data pipelines, CRM integrations, report automation, web scraping

**Pricing:** $400 for simple automation | $1,500+ for complex pipelines

Tell us what you want to automate!

We build powerful e-commerce platforms 🛒:

**Platforms:** Custom Django shops, WooCommerce, Shopify integrations
**Payments:** Stripe, PayPal, EasyPaisa, JazzCash, Meezan Bank
**Features:** Multi-vendor, inventory, analytics, coupons, real-time tracking

**Pricing:**
- Basic shop: $1,000
- Full multi-vendor platform: $4,000+

We built PakShop Pro with full EasyPaisa/JazzCash integration!

Our pricing is transparent and fixed 💰:

| Service | Range |
|---------|-------|
| Simple website | $500 – $2,000 |
| Full platform | $2,000 – $8,000 |
| Enterprise | $8,000 – $20,000+ |

**Payment:** 30% upfront | 40% mid | 30% on delivery

Want a free custom quote for your project?

Our delivery timelines ⏱️:

- **Simple websites:** 1–3 weeks
- **MVPs:** 3–6 weeks
- **Full platforms:** 6–16 weeks
- **Mobile apps:** 4–12 weeks
- **AI chatbot:** 1–2 weeks
- **UI/UX Design:** 3–7 days

We do agile sprints with daily/weekly updates so you always know the status. Rush delivery available — ask us!

Reach us anytime 📞:

- **Office Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 10 AM – 8 PM PKT
- **Discovery Call:** Free 30-minute session — just message us on WhatsApp!

We respond within 2 hours on WhatsApp. Message now!

Our live portfolio 🏆:

1. **E-Services Portal** — 100K+ citizens/month | Django + React + AWS
2. **Quran & Athan App** — 50K+ downloads, 4.8★ Play Store | Flutter + Firebase

Our proven 7-step process 📋:

1. **Discovery Call** (Free, 30 min) — understand your goals
2. **Proposal in 24h** — detailed scope, timeline & fixed price
3. **Design Sprint** (3–5 days) — wireframes & mockups
4. **Development** (2–12 weeks) — agile sprints, daily updates
5. **QA & Testing** (1–2 weeks) — automated + manual testing
6. **Launch & Handover** — deployment + full documentation
7. **30-day Free Support** — bug fixes & tweaks post-launch

Ready to start? Book a free discovery call!

- **30 days FREE** post-launch support (bug fixes & minor tweaks)

We're your long-term tech partner, not a one-time vendor.
